title: rubus × vicariiformis
intro: Rubus × vicariiformis, also known as the black raspberry or thimbleberry hybrid, is a type of bramble that is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its high content of anthocyanins, powerful antioxidants that help protect against cell damage and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × vicariiformis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant-rich support for the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
